"'''The Crystal'''" was a short story written by [[Elaine Cunningham]] and published in [[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]] in [[2001]] and later on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], her brothers and friends graduate from the [[Jedi Praxeum]]. After graduating from the Academy, Jaina asks her aunt, [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], to be her mentor. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] gives his daughter a heavily modified [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] as a present and she decides to fly it to [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] where they are having a vacation. During her inaugural flight, however, she gets held up because a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] misidentifies her as his enemy, and tries to destroy her. He thinks that the Z-95 is a prototype despite the fact that it was manufactured many [[Standard year/Legends|years]] ago. Despite suffering some damage in the dogfight, Jaina destroys the enemy fighter while sparing the pilot's life, proceeding then to Mon Calamari. She decides to call her Z-95 the [[Crystal (starfighter)|''Crystal'']]. 

==Continuity==
[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara]] was described as suffering from a mysterious ailment in her appearance here, a story point that continued through the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'']] novels.<ref name="ERC" />
